new_classes.definition_en: Sparkling wine of fresh grapes falling under CN subheading 2204 10 94: sparkling wine that is not Champagne (2204 10 11), not Prosecco (2204 10 15), and not another named sparkling wine covered by subheadings 2204 10 11–2204 10 93 within the range 2204 10 11–2204 10 98; classified under subheading note 1 of Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for 22041094 covers sparkling wines in the range 2204 10 11–2204 10 98 with reference to Chapter 22 subheading note 1. The proposed axioms capture: (1) membership in WineOfFreshGrapes2204 as parent; (2) the sparkling wine quality (via SparklingWineQuality); (3) explicit exclusion of Champagne (2204 10 11) and Prosecco (2204 10 15), the two named siblings present in the running TBox. Coverage is reduced because: (a) subheading note 1 of Chapter 22 defines the excess-pressure threshold (≥ 3 bar at 20 °C) for sparkling wine classification, but no numeric pressure range restriction specific to 22041094 is modelled beyond the shared SparklingWineQuality; (b) other named sparkling wine siblings within 2204 10 11–2204 10 93 (e.g. Asti, Crémant, etc.) are not yet present in the TBox and cannot be complemented; (c) the note is largely a cross-reference to subheading note 1, limiting further expressible distinguishing content.
